title: alstonia scholaris
intro: Alstonia scholaris, also known as the Dita bark or White Chebula, is a medium-sized tree native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alstonia scholaris include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing protection against certain types of cancer and neurological disorders. Alstonia scholaris is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
